title: Principal Fleet Manager at Blue Dart Global Group

jsonLd.title: Principal Fleet Manager at Blue Dart Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Fleet Manager looking for your next big career move? Blue Dart Global Group in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Blue Dart Global Group:
Blue Dart Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart Global Group!
